metadata.description: Tiangong LCA skills for hybrid search, embedding, LCI review/remediation, and process automation across flows, processes, and lifecycle models.

plugins.name: lca-hybrid-search
plugins.description: Hybrid search edge functions for flows, processes, and lifecycle models with query rewrite, filters, and RPC troubleshooting.

plugins.name: lca-review-and-remediation
plugins.description: Lifecycle inventory review plus batch flow remediation and publish workflows with schema and version gating.

plugins.name: lca-process-automation
plugins.description: End-to-end process_from_flow automation to build ILCD process and source datasets with resume/publish controls.

plugins.name: lca-embedding
plugins.description: Supabase edge embedding_ft worker for PGMQ embedding jobs and SageMaker vector writes to Postgres.
